story.text: As an AI, I need to hold a field of atoms at an admitted temperature, heating stalled work and cooling runaway inflow, because bdo wants an orchestrator that can tell itself to back off before it floods the one slow stage: the human.

_note: This file is the atom's birth record and content-hash source. It is never mutated: current verdicts and state are always the fold over .ai-native/log/ (D-5). The verdicts block above records the state at authoring time only.
